claim.text: Built a document-intake agent with a human-approval gate for low-confidence items

findings.evidence_pointer: portfolio.md describes the LLM-vs-deterministic split and the 0.75-confidence / refund human gate
findings.rationale: The decision boundary and human gate are described concretely in the work sample.

claim.text: Replaced a 6-hour weekly reconciliation with a tested scripted pipeline

findings.rationale: Outcome described but no artifact or metric is included to check.

claim.text: Keeps a 60-item labeled set and reruns it before changes; expanded it after a French-intake weakness

findings.evidence_pointer: portfolio.md describes the labeled set, the rerun-before-change discipline, and the specific multilingual fix
findings.rationale: A specific eval practice with a concrete coverage fix reads as real.

matcher_notes: Strong for a self-taught path: a work sample makes two claims checkable. One external link is a blind spot (not fetched).
